mapper.sql: select m.buyer_menu_id as menu_id, m.menu_name, p.menu_name as parent_name, m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.route_name, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.icon, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from buyer_menu m left join buyer_menu p on p.buyer_menu_id = m.parent_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from buyer_menu where parent_id = #{menuId}
select count(1) from buyer_role_menu where buyer_menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.update: update buyer_menu set menu_name = #{menuName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, order_num = #{orderNum}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, `query` = #{query}, route_name = #{routeName}, is_frame = #{isFrame}, is_cache = #{isCache}, menu_type = #{menuType}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, perms = #{perms}, icon = #{icon}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where buyer_menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.select: select m.buyer_menu_id from buyer_menu m inner join buyer_role_menu rm on rm.buyer_menu_id = m.buyer_menu_id inner join buyer_role r on r.buyer_role_id = rm.buyer_role_id where rm.buyer_role_id = #{roleId} and r.buyer_id = #{buyerId} and r.del_flag = '0' order by m.parent_id, m.order_num
mapper.sql: select r.buyer_role_id as role_id, r.buyer_id as subject_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.status, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from buyer_role r
mapper.select:
where r.del_flag = '0'
and r.buyer_id = #{subjectId}
and r.role_name like concat('%', #{roleName}, '%')
and r.role_key like concat('%', #{roleKey}, '%')
and r.status = #{status}
and date_format(r.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(r.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by r.role_sort, r.buyer_role_id
mapper.update: update buyer_role set role_name = #{roleName}, role_key = #{roleKey}, role_sort = #{roleSort}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where buyer_id = #{subjectId} and buyer_role_id = #{roleId} and del_flag = '0'
update buyer_role set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where buyer_id = #{buyerId} and buyer_role_id = #{roleId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select distinct m.perms from buyer_account_role ar inner join buyer_account a on a.buyer_account_id = ar.buyer_account_id inner join buyer_role r on r.buyer_role_id = ar.buyer_role_id inner join buyer_role_menu rm on rm.buyer_role_id = r.buyer_role_id inner join buyer_menu m on m.buyer_menu_id = rm.buyer_menu_id where a.buyer_id = #{buyerId} and a.buyer_account_id = #{accountId} and r.buyer_id = #{buyerId} and r.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and m.status = '0' and m.perms is not null and m.perms != ''

select distinct m.buyer_menu_id as menu_id, m.menu_name, p.menu_name as parent_name, m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.`query`, m.route_name, m.is_frame, m.is_cache, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.status, ifnull(m.perms, '') as perms, m.icon, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from buyer_account_role ar inner join buyer_account a on a.buyer_account_id = ar.buyer_account_id inner join buyer_role r on r.buyer_role_id = ar.buyer_role_id inner join buyer_role_menu rm on rm.buyer_role_id = r.buyer_role_id inner join buyer_menu m on m.buyer_menu_id = rm.buyer_menu_id left join buyer_menu p on p.buyer_menu_id = m.parent_id where a.buyer_id = #{buyerId} and a.buyer_account_id = #{accountId} and r.buyer_id = #{buyerId} and r.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and m.status = '0' and m.menu_type in ('M', 'C') order by m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.buyer_menu_id

select count(1) from buyer_role where buyer_id = #{buyerId} and del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and buyer_role_id in
#{roleId}

select count(1) from buyer_menu where buyer_menu_id >= 200000 and buyer_menu_id < 300000 and status = '0' and buyer_menu_id in
#{menuId}
